title: Fire at LGBT+ Club Leads to Arrest
summary: A man was arrested for starting a fire at an LGBT+ nightclub called Pink Punters in Milton Keynes, UK. The fire happened early Sunday morning while many people were inside. Everyone got out safely, and no one was hurt. The police are investigating why the fire was started. The owner of the club said he was sad the building was destroyed but happy that everyone was safe. He promised to rebuild the club. Witnesses said the fire spread quickly, and staff helped people leave quickly. The club has been a safe place for the LGBT+ community for many years.

keywords.explanation: A community of people who are lesbian, gay, bisexual, transgender, and others
A place where people go to dance and have fun at night

background_read: Pink Punters is a nightclub that has been open for 36 years and is a safe place for the LGBT+ community. The club is in Milton Keynes, a town in England.
Article_Structure: WHO: A 51-year-old man arrested for arson, and the owner Frank McMahon.
WHAT: A fire at Pink Punters LGBT+ nightclub led to an arson arrest.
WHERE: Pink Punters nightclub in Fenny Stratford, Milton Keynes, UK.
WHY: The motive is unknown; police urge not to speculate.

perspectives.description: Heartbroken but relieved no one was hurt, vows to rebuild.
Surreal experience; fire spread quickly; staff helped everyone out.
